title: nepeta abyssinica
intro: Nepeta abyssinica, also known as Catmint or African Catmint, is a perennial plant species native to the mountains of East Africa. It is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, making it effective in treating various health issues. The health benefits of Nepeta abyssinica include relief from anxiety and insomnia, as well as a reduction in symptoms of menopause and menstrual cramps. The plant can be used in herbal preparations such as teas, infusions, and tinctures to harness its medicinal properties.
